creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Hi Nick,

There seems to be more to this patch than just changing the makefile.
Look at all the scripts there too (near the bottom of the monolithic
patch!).  Could you take a look at this and submit a patch that includes all
of thse?  You'll probably have to use the configure script that is already
in files/ to sed /usr/local to ${PREFIX} in the scripts, though...

Thanks,

-Chris
